dataset: Ashton Prairie Environmental Geophysics Field Data
data_class: real field data and derived products

issues.finding: 13 of 14 elevations are stored as 0.0 m.
issues.publication_action: Replace zero placeholders in curated products with 8-neighbor IDW estimates and retain source flags.

issues.finding: The one nonzero line-4 elevation differs by about 5.4 m from a neighboring-line IDW estimate.
issues.publication_action: Retain the measured value but flag it for field-metadata review.

issues.finding: The first two records have identical X/Y/Z coordinates.
issues.publication_action: Retain both records and mark duplicate_position in curated point data.

issues.finding: Raw ERT contains many nonpositive/zero or high-deviation records: {'format': 'Syscal whitespace export', 'rows': 210, 'positive_resistivity': 178, 'zero_resistivity': 30, 'negative_resistivity': 2, 'deviation_gt_20_percent': 145, 'zero_voltage': 30, 'qc_positive_dev20_nonzero_voltage': 35}.
issues.publication_action: Do not publish or analyze this file; retain only in the external source archive.

issues.finding: Raw ERT contains many nonpositive/zero or high-deviation records: {'format': 'Syscal whitespace export', 'rows': 761, 'positive_resistivity': 338, 'zero_resistivity': 380, 'negative_resistivity': 43, 'deviation_gt_20_percent': 205, 'zero_voltage': 380, 'qc_positive_dev20_nonzero_voltage': 175}.
issues.publication_action: Do not publish or analyze this file; retain only in the external source archive.

issues.finding: Raw ERT contains many nonpositive/zero or high-deviation records: {'format': 'Res2DInv general array resistance', 'rows': 467, 'positive_resistance': 12, 'zero_resistance': 360, 'negative_resistance': 95, 'resistance_ohm': {'count': 467, 'minimum': -1.83538, 'median': 0.0, 'maximum': 0.21039}}.
issues.publication_action: Do not publish or analyze this file; retain only in the external source archive.
Exclude those rows from the Web GIS resistivity layer; keep them in the raw download.

issues.finding: Layer-1 resistivity equals the 2000 ohm m upper bound in 1810 rows.
issues.publication_action: Treat 2000 ohm m as a bound hit, not a resolved exact value.
